name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
labels: enhancement
---

## Summary

<!-- One sentence describing the feature. -->

## Problem or Motivation

<!-- What limitation or user need does this address?
     Keep in mind the primary users: students with motor impairments who rely on
     minimal keystrokes and keyboard-first interaction. -->

## Proposed Solution

<!-- Describe what you'd like to see. Be as specific as possible about behaviour,
     keyboard shortcuts, or UI changes. -->

## Alternatives Considered

<!-- Any other approaches you thought about and why you ruled them out. -->

## Additional Context

<!-- Mockups, references, related issues, or anything else that helps. -->
